segments.text:
Hear this, O priests! Take heed, O house of Israel!
Give ear, O royal house! For this judgment is against youbecause you have been a snare at Mizpah,
a net spread out on Tabor.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The rebels are deep in slaughter; but I will chastise them all.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
I know all about Ephraim, and Israel is not hidden from Me. For now, O Ephraim, you have turned to prostitution;
Israel is defiled.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Their deeds do not permit themto return to their God, for a spirit of prostitution is within them, and they do not know the LORD.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Israel’s arrogance testifies against them; Israel and Ephraim stumble in their iniquity;
even Judah stumbles with them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They go with their flocks and herdsto seek the LORD, but they do not find Him; He has withdrawn Himself from them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: They have been unfaithful to the LORD; for they have borne illegitimate children. Now the New Moon will devour themalong with their land.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Blow the ram’s horn in Gibeah, the trumpet in Ramah; raise the battle cry in Beth-aven: Lead on, O Benjamin!
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Ephraim will be laid wasteon the day of rebuke. Among the tribes of IsraelI proclaim what is certain.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The princes of Judahare like those who move boundary stones; I will pour out My furyupon them like water.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Ephraim is oppressed, crushed in judgment, for he is determined to follow worthless idols.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So I am like a moth to Ephraim, and like decay to the house of Judah.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: When Ephraim saw his sickness and Judah his wound, then Ephraim turned to Assyria and sent to the great king. But he cannot cure youor heal your wound.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For I am like a lion to Ephraim and like a young lion to the house of Judah. I, even I, will tear them to pieces and then go away. I will carry them offwhere no one can rescue them.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text:
Then I will return to My placeuntil they admit their guilt and seek My face;
in their affliction they will earnestly seek Me.
segments.speaker: God
